title: Music+
description: A mod that adds many custom sounds and music, mostly deprived from well known memes.
body:
A mod that adds custom sounds and music!

This mod adds many Music Disks to be played in jukeboxes. There are ~30+ discs. There are also many sound effects that can be played with the `/playsound` command such as,
- Alarms
- Door SFX
- Airlock Cycle SFX
- Some popular meme sounds 


<details>
<summary>Sound Origins</summary>

- [https://www.youtube.com/@Infraction](https://www.youtube.com/@Infraction)
- [https://www.myinstants.com/en/index/us/](https://www.myinstants.com/en/index/us/)

</details>

You can play these sounds with the command `/playsound <Person who hears it> musicplus:<Sounds should appear in the tab list> <netrual or record>`
For example to play the sound `alarm3` to all players, use this command:
`/playsound @a musicplus:alarm3 netrual`
